violations.text: Utensils and teabags were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

Pre-packaged orange juice and milk labeled "Keep Refrigerated" was observed held at 47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC, items were placed in the unit an hour prior to inspection. Items moved to proper refrigeration. Refrigerator was observed to be adjusted to a low temperature setting. Temperature setting was lowered at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024

The gaskets of all the lowboy refrigeration units in the front service/prep area was observed to be frayed. Equipment components such as doors, seals, hinges, gaskets, and kick plates shall be kept intact, tight, and adjusted in accordance with manufacturer's specifications. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of biofilm. Non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine must be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024
